title: Pupil experiences in school: academic year 2024 to 2025
body: "This report collates and thematically presents previously published data collected via the Department for Education (DfE) omnibus surveys focusing on pupils’ experiences in schools.  The data has been collected from pupils in secondary schools and parents of pupils in primary, secondary and special schools. It covers:   experiences of school including feeling of belonging, safety and enjoyment relationships with school staff motivation to learn   "
